blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
